tasks.label: build
tasks.detail: Full build: transformer → types → eastwind (root: pnpm build)

tasks.label: build types (tspc -b)
tasks.detail: Builds every composite project (entities/logic/react) via the root solution.

tasks.label: watch types
tasks.detail: tspc -b --watch — keeps emitted JS fresh for vite dev.

tasks.label: dev (eastwind)
tasks.detail: Runs eastwind types + server + client watchers (root: pnpm dev).

tasks.label: build eastwind server bundle
tasks.detail: Bundles transformer-emitted logic JS into one runnable file (used by the server debugger).

tasks.label: tsc: build - quote-transformer-test
tasks.detail: preLaunchTask for the transformer-test debug configs.
